results.title: Lake lapping it up after dream entry to the top level
results.description: Campbell Lake has taken part in his first AFL win just 19 days after joining the Saints

results.title: ThyssenKrupp AG Sponsored ADR (OTCMKTS:TKAMY) Sees Large Increase in Short Interest
results.description: ThyssenKrupp AG Sponsored ADR (OTCMKTS:TKAMY – Get Free Report) saw a significant increase in short interest during the month of May. As of May 29th, there was short interest totaling 4,642 shares, an increase of 148.0% from the May 14th total of 1,872 shares. Currently, 0.0% of the shares of the company are sold short. [...]

results.title: Josh Hart celebrates Mikal Bridges after Knicks win elusive title: ‘Forget them picks, dawg’
results.description: Hart took the occasion of his post-game interview with Ernie Johnson to celebrate Bridges, for whom the Knicks famously traded five first-round draft picks in July 2024.
